http.purpose: Load and update assigned issues through the Linear GraphQL API.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Linear API Key
preferences.description: Create a personal API key in Linear Settings > API. The key is sent as the Linear Authorization header.

preferences.name: teamKey
preferences.title: Team Key
preferences.description: Optional team key filter, such as ENG or DES.

preferences.name: stateFilter
preferences.title: Issue States
preferences.description: Choose whether completed and canceled issues should be shown.

preferences.name: maxRows
preferences.title: Maximum Rows
preferences.description: How many issues to show in the widget.
